title: anotis boerhavioides
intro: Anotis boerhavioides, also known as the false bugseed or Boerhavia plant, is a type of succulent plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Anotis boerhavioides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate kidney problems, and treat various types of infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat a variety of ailments, including urinary tract infections and digestive issues.
